---
description: 'Decompose PRD into Epics'
mode: 'agent'
---

Read the existing PRD from the `specs/prds/` folder. 
Identify 3-4 high-level Epics. Each Epic must deliver end-to-end value, be independently deployable, map to a Success Metric from the PRD, and have clear boundaries.
Format each Epic using the `specs/templates/epic-template.md` structure.
Save the output to `specs/epics/EPIC-{number}-{name}.md`.
